name: Ceramides
description: Lipids (fats) that are found naturally in high concentrations in the uppermost layers of skin.
scientificSummary: Acts like mortar between the bricks of your skin cells, preventing moisture loss and blocking out environmental damage.
mechanismOfAction: Acts like mortar between the bricks of your skin cells, preventing moisture loss and blocking out environmental damage.

seo.title: Ceramides - Clinical Profile & Compatibility | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover the scientific benefits, compatibility, and clinical profile of Ceramides in skincare.
